goal: Verify exact-fingerprint sensor preview: learn, recognize, correct, and multi-bind.

steps.action: sense bedroom.jpg → agent says 'new image' → user labels 'bedroom'
steps.expected_outcome: SensorBinding created linking bedroom.jpg fingerprint to 'bedroom' location.

steps.action: sense bedroom.jpg → agent says 'recognized image' → guess: bedroom → user confirms
sense bedroom.jpg → agent guesses bedroom → user says no → user labels 'office'
steps.expected_outcome: SensorBinding updated to point to 'office' instead of 'bedroom'.

steps.action: sense bedroom.jpg → label 'office'; sense lobby.png → label 'office' → both recognized
steps.expected_outcome: Two distinct fingerprints bound to the same 'office' location.

steps.action: sense lobby.png (never seen) → agent says 'new image' → user labels 'lobby'
steps.expected_outcome: New SensorBinding created; 'new image' message confirmed.
